records.ety: [Ir. or Gael. uisge beatha, literally, water of life; uisge water + beatha life; akin to Gr. bi`os life. See Quick, a., and cf. Whisky.]

defs: A compound distilled spirit made in Ireland and Scotland; whisky.
quotes: The Scottish returns being vested in grouse, white hares, pickled salmon, and usquebaugh.

defs: A liquor compounded of brandy, or other strong spirit, raisins, cinnamon and other spices.
